title: CREADY | 2-Pack Kitchen Oil Spray 100ml | Oil Sprayer | Air Fryer Oil Spray | Multipurpose Sprayer | Stainless Steel & Glass | Reusable & Non-Slip | 100ml Capacity
features: ⭐ Effortless use and cleaning ⭐ With our high-quality oil sprayer, the essential kitchen gadget, you can effortlessly control the amount of oil when cooking. A simple pressure on the spray head is enough to produce an even amount of spray. Thanks to the transparent bottle, you always keep an eye on the remaining oil level and make cleaning easier.

⭐ Versatile sprayer ⭐ Our oil sprayer is reusable and extremely versatile. Perfect for olive oil, rapeseed oil, vegetable oil and vinegar. This practical kitchen gadget is perfect for grilling, roasting, preparing salads, and frying.

⭐ Premium quality and well thought-out design ⭐ Made from high-quality 304 stainless steel and glass, our oil sprayer impresses not only with its quality but also with its design. The non-slip spray head creates a fine mist when you use the sprayer upright. No slipping, no waste.

⭐ COMPACT AND LIGHTWEIGHT ⭐ Our oil sprayer is handy and compact, ideal for controlling the amount of oil in your kitchen. With the dimensions 18 cm (H) x 3.8 cm (D) and a capacity of 100 ml, it fits perfectly to your needs. The elegant and portable design allows you to fill it with your favorite cooking or grill oil.

⭐ Less waste, healthier cooking ⭐ Our cooking oil sprayer ensures even distribution, saves product and helps reduce calories. An efficient kitchen gadget to improve taste and prepare healthier meals. Try it today!
description: Easy to use and clean: Simply press the pump of a sprayer to produce a more uniform spray and control the amount of oil when cooking. The transparent bottle allows you to clearly see how much oil is left and makes it easier to control the oil dispenser.
